---
title: "brute_force"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(bayesrules)
library(tidyverse)
library(rstan)
library(rstanarm)
library(bayesplot)
library(tidybayes)
library(janitor)
library(broom.mixed)
```

```{r}
dataset <- read.csv("../data/data.csv")
```

```{r}
data <- dataset |>
  select(
    gallstone = Gallstone.Status,
    gender = Gender,
    age = Age,
    bfr = Total.Body.Fat.Ratio..TBFR.....,
    bmi = Body.Mass.Index..BMI.,
    glucose = Glucose,
    comorbid = Comorbidity,
    height = Height,
    weight = Weight,
    tbw = Total.Body.Water..TBW.,
    ecw = Extracellular.Water..ECW.,
    icw = Intracellular.Water..ICW.,
    ecftbw = Extracellular.Fluid.Total.Body.Water..ECF.TBW.,
    tbfr = Total.Body.Fat.Ratio..TBFR.....,
    lean_mass = Lean.Mass..LM.....,
    bpc = Body.Protein.Content..Protein.....,
    vfr = Visceral.Fat.Rating..VFR.,
    bone_mass = Bone.Mass..BM.,
    musc_mass = Muscle.Mass..MM.,
    obesity = Obesity....,
    tfc = Total.Fat.Content..TFC.,
    vfa = Visceral.Fat.Area..VFA.,
    vma = Visceral.Muscle.Area..VMA...Kg.,
    hfa = Hepatic.Fat.Accumulation..HFA.,
    tc = Total.Cholesterol..TC.,
    ldl = Low.Density.Lipoprotein..LDL.,
    hdl = High.Density.Lipoprotein..HDL.,
    trigly = Triglyceride,
    alt = Alanin.Aminotransferaz..ALT.,
    alp = Alkaline.Phosphatase..ALP.,
    creat = Creatinine,
    gfr = Glomerular.Filtration.Rate..GFR.,
    crp = C.Reactive.Protein..CRP.,
    hgb = Hemoglobin..HGB.,
    vita_d = Vitamin.D
  ) |>
  mutate(comorbid = ifelse(comorbid == 0, 0, 1),
         gallstone = ifelse(gallstone == 0, 1, 0))
```

## Test Model

### Model 1; 7 Predictors; ~82% accuracy
formula = gallstone ~ vita_d + bone_mass + crp + icw + hgb + hfa + gender
cutoff = 0.355, 0.366-0.370

### Model 2; 6 Predictors; ~81.5% accuracy
formula = gallstone ~ vita_d + bone_mass + crp + icw + hgb + hfa
cutoff = 0.377

### Model 3; 5 Predictors;  ~80% accuracy
formula = gallstone ~ vita_d + bone_mass + crp + icw + hgb
cutoff = 0.413, 0.414, 0.417

### Model 4; 4 Predictors; ~79% accuracy
formula = gallstone ~ vita_d + bone_mass + crp + hgb
cutoff = 0.455, 0.456, 0.483, 0.501, 0.502

### Model 5; 3 Predictors; ~80% accuracy
formula = gallstone ~ vita_d + bone_mass + crp
cutoff = 0.475

```{r}
set.seed(84735)

posterior_model <- stan_glm(
  formula = gallstone ~ vita_d + bone_mass,
  data = data,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  prior_intercept = normal(location = qlogis(0.0605), scale = abs(qlogis(0.065) - qlogis(0.056)) / 4, autoscale = F),
  prior = normal(location = 0, scale = 2.5, autoscale = T),
  chains = 4, iter = 5000*2, seed = 84735,
  prior_PD = F, refresh = F, cores = 16
)
```

## Results

```{r}
set.seed(84735)
posterior_interval(posterior_model, prob = 0.95)
proportion_gallstone <- function(x){mean(x == 1)}
pp_check(posterior_model, nreps = 1000,
         plotfun = "stat", stat = "proportion_gallstone") + 
  xlab("probability of gallstone")
```
### Set Range to Fit Graph

```{r}
set.seed(84735)
range <- seq(from = 0.1, to = 0.25, by = 0.001)
for (i in range) {
  print(classification_summary(model = posterior_model, data = data, cutoff = i)$accuracy_rates)
  print(i)
}
```

```{r}
set.seed(84735)
cv_accuracy <- classification_summary_cv(
  model = posterior_model, data = data, cutoff = 0.355, k = 10)
```

```{r}
cv_accuracy
```

## Do Not Touch

```{r}
corr <- cor(data)
```

```{r}
library(ggcorrplot)
x11(width = 30, height = 30)
ggsave("correlation_map.png", plot = ggcorrplot(corr, lab = T), width = 30, height = 30, dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
summary(lm(gallstone ~ ., data = data))
```
